apiFallback.cultivationMethodState: Failed to load cultivation method state

toast.newMail: You have new mail from the Heavenly Herald!

login.note: Your password is protected per session.

register.success: Sect founded. Please enter meditation, fellow daoist.

forgot.title: Recover Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your registered email; we'll send a one-time reset link (valid for 30 minutes).
forgot.sent: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.

reset.title: Set New Password
reset.subtitle: Enter your new password. The reset link can only be used once.
reset.tokenFromUrl: Code auto-filled from the email link.
reset.success: Password reset. Please sign in with your new password.
reset.mismatch: The two new password entries do not match.
reset.missingToken: Reset link is missing the code. Please reopen it from the email.

errors.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Account name or password is incorrect.
errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: This account is already registered or input is invalid.
errors.OLD_PASSWORD_WRONG: Old password is incorrect or account not found.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.INVALID_RESET_TOKEN: Reset link is invalid or has expired.

home.wip: Game shell work in progress — Topbar, Sidebar, ChatDock and GameHome.

breakthrough.notAtPeakToast: Not enough accumulated qi to break through.

items.NO_CHARACTER: You haven't onboarded yet — complete character creation first.
items.BREAKTHROUGH_READY: Qi is full! Ready to break through to the next realm.
items.DAILY_LOGIN_AVAILABLE: Today's login reward is ready — claim some spirit stones.
items.TOPUP_PENDING: Top-up {code} is pending approval — check Settings.
items.CULTIVATE_IDLE: You're not cultivating — tap ‘Cultivate’ to absorb qi.

steps.character: Create your character — pick a Dao name.
steps.sect: Join a sect — choose one of three.
steps.cultivate: Start Cultivating to absorb spirit qi.
steps.breakthrough: Complete your first breakthrough — leave Mortal.
steps.leaderboard: Visit the leaderboard to size up your peers.
steps.mail: Check your mailbox — there may be gifts waiting.

notFound.title: 404 · Lost in the Void
notFound.desc: You have wandered into the void.

step1.title: Welcome to Dao Mon
lines: I am A Linh, spirit child to the Heavenly Herald.
You have just crossed from the mortal world; we will start this cultivation journey together.
First, tell me the dao name you wish to bear.

errors.tooShort: Dao name must be at least 3 characters.
errors.tooLong: Dao name must be at most 16 characters.
errors.invalid: Only letters, numbers, dot and underscore, no whitespace.
errors.taken: This dao name is already taken; please pick another.

step3.title: Pick Your Starting Sect
lines: Each sect has a distinct starting technique. Pick the one where you want to settle.

thanh_van.name: Thanh Van Sect
thanh_van.desc: Sword masters focused on bursty offense.

huyen_thuy.name: Huyen Thuy Palace
huyen_thuy.desc: Deep alchemy specialists; defense and healing.

tu_la.name: Tu La Cult
tu_la.desc: Demonic and savage — blood for power.

step4.title: Set Out
lines: {name}, from this moment you officially enter Qi Refining Stage 1.
Press ‘Start Cultivation’ to absorb qi. Your realm will grow with time.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard

subtitle.power: Top 50 cultivators — sorted by realm and power.
subtitle.topup: Top 50 spenders — total approved Tiên Ngọc orders.
subtitle.sect: Top 50 sects — sorted by treasury linh thạch.

leaderboard.empty: No cultivators on the board yet.

activity.title: Activity Log
activity.subtitle: History of currency and item changes for your character.
activity.noCharacter: You don't have a character yet — finish onboarding first.

errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: Session expired — please sign in again.
errors.NO_CHARACTER: You don't have a character yet — no activity log.
errors.INVALID_CURSOR: Page cursor invalid — reload the page.
errors.UNKNOWN: Could not load activity log. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, password and active sessions.

password.title: Change Password
password.hint: Changing password logs out all devices. You will need to sign in again with the new password.
password.empty: Please fill in both current and new passwords.
password.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
password.success: Password updated. Please sign in again.

logoutAll.title: Sign out everywhere
logoutAll.hint: Revoke all sessions including this one. Other devices will be logged out within ~15 minutes.
logoutAll.confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out of all devices?

errors.PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: New password is too weak (min 8 characters).
errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: Session expired, please sign in again.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests, try again later.

errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: Session expired. Please log in again.
Session expired. Please log in again.

giftcode.title: Redeem Gift Code
giftcode.hint: Enter a gift code to claim rewards. Each code can be used once per account.

errors.ALREADY_REDEEMED: You have already redeemed this code.
errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: Session expired. Please log in again.

chat.title: Chat
chat.noSect: You are not in a sect yet
chat.noSectShort: You are not in a sect yet.

errors.NO_SECT: You are not in a sect.

dungeon.title: Sparring Hall
dungeon.ended: Fight ended. You can enter a new one.
dungeon.noFight: No active fight — pick a dungeon on the left to start.

errors.STAMINA_LOW: Not enough stamina; wait to recover.
errors.SKILL_NOT_USABLE: This skill is not from your sect.
errors.ALREADY_IN_FIGHT: You are already in another fight.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.emptyAll: Inventory is empty — go to Sparring Hall to loot.

refine.failNoLossToast: Refine failed — no level loss (safe stage).
refine.failProtectedToast: Refine failed — protection charm preserved level {finalLevel}.

gem.unsocketDriftToast: Unsocketed slot {slot} (gem no longer in catalog).

errors.GEM_INCOMPATIBLE_SLOT: Gem does not fit this equipment slot.
errors.NO_NEXT_TIER: Highest tier gem — cannot combine further.

market.title: Market
market.cancelToast: Listing removed — item returned to inventory.

errors.CANNOT_BUY_OWN: You cannot buy your own listing.

shop.title: NPC Shop
shop.subtitle: Buy common pills and starter gear from the NPC vendor.

errors.NON_STACKABLE_QTY_GT_1: This item can only be bought 1 at a time.
errors.NO_CHARACTER: You have not created a character.
errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: Session expired. Please log in again.

sect.title: Sect
sect.noneList: No sect yet — be the first to found one.
sect.alreadyInOther: You are already in another sect
sect.inOtherSect: You are in {name} — leave first if you want to found a new sect.

errors.NOT_IN_SECT: You are not in a sect.
errors.ALREADY_IN_SECT: You are already in a sect — leave it first.

boss.title: World Boss
boss.noneTitle: No boss is around right now.
boss.noneHint: A new boss spawns a few dozen minutes after the previous one is defeated or expired.
boss.rewardExpire: If the boss expires, rewards drop to 60% of the pool.
boss.defeatedToast: {name} has fallen! Rewards distributed by rank.

topup.title: Top Up Tien Ngoc
topup.intro: Tien Ngoc is used for gacha, VIP perks, and unique skins & items.
topup.rule1: ⚠ Manual top-up via bank transfer: pick a pack → server issues a transfer code → scan QR / send exact amount + exact memo → admin approves. Each code is single-use.
topup.rule2: Max 5 pending orders per user. Wrong memo will be rejected.
topup.amount: Amount: {price} — will credit {ngoc} Tien Ngoc on approval.
topup.bankLine: Transfer to: {bank} — {name} — {number}. Memo must match the code exactly.
topup.orderCreatedToast: Order {code} created — transfer with the exact memo to get approved.

errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: Session expired, please sign in again.
errors.TOO_MANY_PENDING: Too many pending orders — approve some first.

admin.title: Admin

alerts.title: Economy alerts
alerts.subtitle: Anomalies in currency / inventory / topup PENDING > {hours}h

ledgerAudit.title: Ledger audit
ledgerAudit.subtitle: Verify CurrencyLedger sum matches Character.linhThach/tienNgoc and ItemLedger.qtyDelta matches InventoryItem.qty.

economyReport.title: Economy report
economyReport.subtitle: Top 10 richest characters + total linhThach / tienNgoc circulation.

recentActivity.title: Recent admin activity
recentActivity.subtitle: Last 5 admin/MOD actions from the audit log — handy for live tracking when multiple admins are working.

admin.noPermission: You do not have access to this area.

users.exportTruncatedToast: Exported {exported}/{total} rows (capped at 5000). Refine filters to export the rest.
users.revokeHint: Writes ledger ADMIN_REVOKE + audit log admin.inventory.revoke. Use when an item was granted by mistake / for rollback support. Quantity 1..999.
users.selfDemoteBlocked: Cannot target your own account (lock-out protection).

giftcodes.revokeConfirm: Revoke {code}? Players can no longer redeem this code.
giftcodes.revokeModalExpired: Code already expired — revoke to clean up history.
giftcodes.revokeModalExpiresSoon: Code expires soon (<24h) — consider before revoking.
giftcodes.revokeModalWarning: This action cannot be undone. Players will see this code as invalid immediately after revoke.

boss.title: Spawn World Boss
boss.hint: Leave bossKey empty to auto-rotate by catalog. If a boss is ACTIVE, enable Force to expire it before spawning a new one.

errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: Session expired, please sign in again.
errors.ADMIN_ONLY: ADMIN role required for this action.
errors.INVALID_INPUT: Invalid parameters (out of range / too negative).
errors.CODE_EXISTS: Code already exists — please choose a different one.
errors.BOSS_ALREADY_ACTIVE: A boss is already active. Enable Force to replace it.
errors.INVALID_BOSS_KEY: Boss key not found in catalog.

talents.title: Insight · Talents
talents.subtitle: Catalog of {total} talents covering all 5 elements
talents.empty: No talents match the current filter.

alchemy.title: Alchemy Hall
alchemy.subtitle: Craft pills from herbs + recipes — server rolls RNG, ingredients are not refunded on failure.

errors.REALM_REQUIREMENT_NOT_MET: Cultivation realm not high enough to upgrade.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS: Not enough Spirit Stones to upgrade.

cultivationMethod.title: Cultivation Method Hall
cultivationMethod.subtitle: Manage learned cultivation methods. A cultivator runs only one method at a time — pick by realm, spiritual root, and sect.

errors.NOT_LEARNED: You have not learned this method.
errors.WRONG_SECT: This method belongs to a different sect.
errors.FORBIDDEN_ELEMENT: Your spiritual root conflicts with this method.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Each milestone on your path of cultivation. Complete them to claim spirit stones, immortal jade, EXP and titles.
achievements.empty: No achievements match the selected filter.

errors.NOT_FOUND_PROGRESS: You have not made progress on this achievement yet.
errors.ALREADY_CLAIMED: You have already claimed this reward.

tribulation.title: Tribulation
tribulation.subtitle: Endure the heavens' trial to ascend to the next realm. The server resolves outcomes deterministically.
tribulation.notAtPeakHint: You must reach the 9th sub-realm with sufficient EXP before attempting tribulation.

empty.noNextRealm: Already at peak realm, no further tribulation.
empty.lowTier: Transition from {from} → {to} requires no tribulation. Use normal Breakthrough.

attempt.failToast: Tribulation failed, train more before retrying.

errors.NOT_AT_PEAK: Must reach 9th sub-realm with full EXP before attempting tribulation.
errors.NO_NEXT_REALM: Already at peak realm, no further tribulation.
errors.NO_TRIBULATION_FOR_TRANSITION: This transition requires no tribulation. Use normal Breakthrough.
errors.COOLDOWN_ACTIVE: Must wait for cooldown before retrying.
